title: taraxacum subvulpinum
intro: Taraxacum subvulpinum, also known as lesser horse daisy or dwarf dandelion, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the sunflower family. It possesses medicinal properties due to its high levels of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Taraxacum subvulpinum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a diuretic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
